# OAuth2 Scopes

What is an OAuth2 scope?

---ANSWER---

Scopes are used to limit the access an application has to a user's account. An application can request one or more scopes, which are presented to the user on the consent screen.

### Life Analogy
Like giving a valet the "valet key" to your car. They can drive it, but they can't open the trunk.

### Key Points
- Limits access.
- Requires user consent.
